hdfc.cash_advance: 2.5% of the amount withdrawn or ₹500, whichever is higher
hdfc.cash_advance_raw: A transaction fee of 2.5% (Excluding Infinia, Infinia Metal Edition) or ₹500 whichever is higher would be levied on the amount withdrawn (Not Applicable for Paytm HDFC Bank Digital Credit Card as cash withdrawal is not allowed) (Not Applicable for Micro Enterprise Card as cash withdrawal is not allowed)

cash_advance_exceptions.Infinia: No cash advance transaction fee (excluded from the 2.5% levy; finance charges still accrue from withdrawal date)
cash_advance_exceptions.Infinia (Metal Edition): No cash advance transaction fee (excluded from the 2.5% levy; finance charges still accrue from withdrawal date)
cash_advance_exceptions.Paytm HDFC Bank Digital Credit Card: Not applicable — cash withdrawal not allowed on this card
cash_advance_exceptions.Micro Enterprise card: Not applicable — cash withdrawal not allowed on this card

hdfc.cash_interest: All cash advances also carry a finance charge equal to charges on revolving credit (Refer schedule of charges) from the date of withdrawal until the date of full payment. Finance charges on cash advances are applicable from the date of transaction until the payment is made in full.
hdfc.interest_free_days: The interest free credit period could range from 20 to 50 days (up to 50 days)
hdfc.source_section: Fees & Charges — Cash advance fee (p.7), Finance charges for revolving credit & cash advances (p.10), Late Payment Charges table (p.13/p.38). Finance-charge variant table (p.10): Infinia, Infinia (Metal Edition), Diners Black Metal Edition, Diners Black, BizBlack Metal Card = 1.99%pm/23.88%pa; Micro Enterprise Card = 1.5%pm/18%pa; all other variants = 3.75%pm/45.0%pa; FD-linked cards carry the same revolving rate as the respective variant. Cash advance 2.5%/₹500 excludes Infinia & Infinia (Metal Edition) per p.7 clause, and is N/A for Paytm Digital & Micro Enterprise. Forex 2% for Infinia/Infinia Metal/Diners Black Metal/Diners Black/BizBlack Metal (HDFC product fees pages; MITC fee table left these cells blank).

icici.cash_advance: 2.5% of the advance amount, subject to a minimum of ₹500
icici.cash_advance_raw: On all cards - 2.5% on advanced amount, subject to minimum transaction fee of Rs.500. Exception: ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card - Nil, ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card - Nil, ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Credit Card - Nil, Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card - Nil
icici.cash_interest: Finance charges for the revolving credit facility on retail transactions and cash advances = 3.75% per month i.e., 45% per annum. Interest is levied on all cash advances from the date of the transaction until the date of payment (no interest-free period on cash advances). The rate may vary at ICICI Bank's discretion - as low as 1.25% per month (15% per annum) and, in case of default, up to a maximum of 3.75% per month (45% per annum).
icici.late_fee_tiers: Less than Rs.100: None; Between Rs.100-Rs.500: Rs.100; Between Rs.501-Rs.1,000: Rs.500; Between Rs.1,001-Rs.5,000: Rs.600; Between Rs.5,001-Rs.10,000: Rs.750; Between Rs.10,001-Rs.25,000: Rs.900; Between Rs.25,001-Rs.50,000: Rs.1,100; More than Rs.50,000: Rs.1,300 (excluding ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card)
icici.source_section: Section I a) 2. Finance Charges (p.7); 3. Other Service Charges and Fees - Foreign currency transactions (p.8) & Cash advance (p.9); 5. Penal Charges and Fees - Late payment charges (p.18); 7. Interest-Free Period and Grace Period (p.21)

sbi.cash_advance: 2.5% of transaction amount (subject to a minimum of Rs.500) for both domestic and international ATMs
sbi.cash_interest: All cash advances carry a finance charge equal to charges on revolving credit (up to 3.75% per month [45% per annum] from the transaction date) from the date of withdrawal until the date of full payment; Free Credit Period: Nil
sbi.late_fee_tiers: Nil for Rs.0-Rs.100; Rs.100 for >Rs.100 & up to Rs.500; Rs.500 for >Rs.500 & up to Rs.1,000; Rs.750 for >Rs.1,000 & up to Rs.10,000; Rs.950 for >Rs.10,000 & up to Rs.25,000; Rs.1,100 for >Rs.25,000 & up to Rs.50,000; Rs.1,300 for >Rs.50,000. Additional Rs.100 levied on missing MAD by due date for two consecutive cycles.
sbi.source_section: Section F Finance Charges (line 501), Section E Interest free credit period (line 497), Cash Advance interest (Section B line 489, line 502), Free Credit Period Nil (line 1218), Cash Advance Fees (lines 1222-1228), Late Payment charges (lines 766-774), Foreign Currency Transaction Fee (line 816), Schedule of Charges summary (lines 1211-1254)

axis.cash_advance: 2.5% (Min. INR 500) of the cash amount; 2% (Min. INR 300) of the cash amount for OLYMPUS Credit Card
axis.cash_interest: Interest will be charged on all cash advances from the date of the withdrawal until the date of payment; for cash advances, interest is charged from the date of transaction until the date of payment (no interest-free period applies to cash advances). Levied at the applicable Finance / Interest Charge rate: 3.75% per month (55.55% per annum) for unsecured cards; 3.4% per month (49.36% per annum) for secured cards.
axis.late_fee_tiers: All other Credit Cards: Nil if total payment due is up to INR 500; INR 500 if between INR 501 and INR 5,000; INR 750 if between INR 5,001 and INR 10,000; INR 1,200 if greater than INR 10,000. OLYMPUS Credit Card: INR 100 if total payment due is greater than INR 2,000. Waived for BURGUNDY PRIVATE Credit Card and PRIMUS Credit Card
axis.source_section: Schedule of Charges: FINANCE / INTEREST CHARGE table (Effective 20th Dec 2024, p.11-14); 2) OTHER FEES and CHARGES table (p.14-18) for Cash withdrawal Fees, Late Payment Fee and Foreign Currency Transaction Fee; section B) Interest-Free Credit Period (p.~37) for interest-free days

kotak.cash_advance: 2.5% of the advance amount, subject to a minimum of ₹500
kotak.cash_advance_raw: 2.5% on advance amount, subject to minimum of ₹500 (All Other Credit Cards). 1% on advance amount for Kotak Solitaire Credit Card; ₹100 per instance for Dream Different / Kotak811 Super Money Credit Card; facility not available on Kotak UPI RuPay Virtual / Kotak Cashback+ / Kotak Cashback+ Prime Credit Cards

cash_advance_exceptions.Kotak UPI RuPay Virtual Credit Card: Cash advance facility not available on this card
cash_advance_exceptions.Kotak Cashback+ Credit Card: Cash advance facility not available on this card
cash_advance_exceptions.Kotak Cashback+ Prime Credit Card: Cash advance facility not available on this card

kotak.cash_interest: Interest will be levied on all cash advances from the date of the transaction until the date of payment (excluding Kotak Solitaire Credit Card, Gold Fortune and Dream Different Cardholders, as they enjoy interest free period for all Cash Advances). Charged at the monthly finance rate per Table B: 3.75% per month (45.00% APR) for standard cards; 3.50% per month (42.00% APR) for White Reserve, Kotak Solitaire, Kotak Signature/Infinite, White Signature, Privy League Signature, Kotak Air+, Kotak811 Super Money and Kotak Air+ Prime Credit Cards. No interest-free period applies to cash advances.
kotak.interest_free_days: up to 51 days (18-48 days or 21-51 days depending on Payment Due Date)
kotak.source_section: Interest Charges table p.5 (Monthly 3.75% / APR 45.00% for standard cards; 3.50% / 42.00% for White Reserve, Kotak Solitaire, Signature/Infinite, White Signature, Privy League Signature, Kotak Air+, Kotak811 Super Money, Kotak Air+ Prime); Cash Advance Fee table p.5; Late Payment Charges table p.6; Foreign Currency Transaction Mark up p.6; Interest Free Period section D p.5 (text line 465-469)

idfc.cash_advance_raw: Rs.199 per transaction (cash advance not applicable for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card)

cash_advance_exceptions.FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card: Not applicable — cash advance not available on this card

idfc.cash_interest: Interest on cash advances is charged at the same finance (interest) rate as purchases and outstanding balances, applied from the date of transaction until paid in full (no separate interest-free period for cash advances). Monthly Rate 0.71%-3.85% / Annual Rate 8.5%-46.2% for all other IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards; FIRST Private Credit Card Monthly Rate 0.75% / Annual Rate 9%. Rates are dynamic and can change/increase up to 3.99% per month (47.88% Annualised) or decrease up to ~0.71% per month (8.50% Annualised) at the Bank's discretion.
idfc.late_fee_tiers: 15% of Total Amount Due as of the previous statement minus any payments received before the due date (subject to a minimum of Rs.100 and a maximum of Rs.1,300). FIRST SWYP Credit Card: same 15% with maximum of Rs.6,000. FIRST Private Credit Card: Nil. FIRST Digital RuPay: as per Primary Credit Card. Illustration tiers: <100 None; 500 -> 100; 5,000 -> 750; 8,000 -> 1,200; 10,000 and above -> 1,300
idfc.interest_free_days: up to 45 days (grace period shall not exceed 45 days; not applicable if previous statement balance not cleared in full)
idfc.source_section: Sec 2 Finance Charges table p.2-3 (All other IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards: Monthly 0.71%-3.85% / Annual 8.5%-46.2%; FIRST Private 0.75%/9%); Sec 3 Other Fees and Charges p.3-4 (Cash advance, Late payment, Markup Charges on Foreign currency); Sec 3 Interest-Free Period p.11 (45 days)

indusind.cash_advance: 2.5% of the advance amount subject to a minimum of Rs.300
indusind.cash_interest: Interest rate of 3.83% per month (46% per annum) levied on the current outstanding balance on a daily basis if Total Amount Due is not paid off by due date; interest is also levied on all fee, charges, interest and service tax. On cash advances, interest is levied from the transaction date itself.
indusind.interest_free_days: Up to 50 days; Interest-free period is not applicable if Total Amount Due is not paid in full
indusind.source_section: OTHER FINANCIAL CHARGES table p.2 (Interest Charge 'For All Cards' 3.83% monthly / 46% annual; Interest-free Period; Late Payment Charges; Cash Advance Charges; Foreign Currency Mark-up 3.5%)

bob.cash_advance: 2.50% of the withdrawn amount or Rs.500 whichever is higher
bob.cash_interest: Cash withdrawal transactions carry finance charge from the date of transaction till the date of full payment, at the applicable finance charge rate (Eterna, Tiara: 3.25% per month i.e. 39% per annum; All other Credit Cards: 3.75% per month i.e. 45% per annum). No interest-free period applies to cash advances.
bob.source_section: TARIFF OF CHARGES: Finance Charges (Eterna, Tiara: 3.25% per month i.e. 39% per annum; All other Credit Cards: 3.75% per month i.e. 45% per annum), Cash Withdrawal Charges, Foreign Currency Transaction Fee, Late Payment Charges (Statement Balance / Charges table), and Interest Free Period 20 to 50 Days rows

amex.cash_advance: A Transaction Fee of 3.5% of the Cash Advance amount, subject to a minimum of ₹250
amex.cash_interest: 3.5% p.m. on Cash Advances, levied from the very next day (the day after the transaction); no interest-free period applies to Cash Advances
amex.late_fee_tiers: Delinquency Fee: 5% on the unpaid balance, with a minimum monthly Delinquency Fee of ₹300; KFS 'Charges in case of default': 30% of Minimum Amount Due, subject to a minimum of ₹500 and maximum of ₹1,000, plus applicable taxes
amex.source_section: Section (a)(iii) Cash Advance Fee; Section (a)(iv) Foreign Currency Transactions 'Currency Conversion Factor Assessment - 3.50%' / Section (c)(viii) 'foreign currency conversion mark up of 3.5%'; Section (a)(vi) Finance Charges ('no Finance Charges applicable' on Charge Cards); Section (a)(vii) Interest Free Grace Period ('up to maximum of 48 days'); Section (a)(ix) Delinquency Fee. Amex India Key Fact Statement (updated August 31, 2025): A(i) Standard Finance Charges table '3.5% P.M' (Goods & Services, Cash & Balance Transfer); A(iv) 'Finance (Interest) Charges for both Revolving credit and Cash Advances: Interest is payable at the monthly percentage rate on all Charges from the date the Cardmember incurs the transaction'; A(iv) FCY 'Currency Conversion Factor Assessment: 3.50%'; A(ii) 'Cash Advance Fee: 3.5% of the Cash Advance Amount, subject to a minimum of ₹250'; B(ii) 'Finance Charges on cash advances are levied from the very next day'; A(vi) 'Charges in case of default: 30% of Minimum Amount Due subject to minimum of ₹500 and maximum of ₹1,000, plus applicable taxes'

federal.cash_advance: 2.5% of amount withdrawn or Rs. 500 whichever is higher (Not applicable for Wave Credit Card)
federal.cash_interest: All cash advances carry finance charges equal to the charges on revolving credit (Interest on Revolving Credit / APR, ranging from 23.88% i.e. 1.99% per month to 45.00% i.e. 3.75% per month based on Average Monthly Balance for last Quarter) from the date of withdrawal until paid. For cash advances, interest is charged from the date of the transaction until the date of payment; there is no interest free period for cash advances.
federal.source_section: SCHEDULE OF CHARGES/TAXES table (Foreign Currency Markup Fee, Cash Advance Fee, Interest free period rows) + 'Other Charges (Common on all Cards)' Interest on Revolving Credit (APR) table and Late Payment Charges table

au.cash_advance: 2.5% of amount withdrawn, minimum Rs.500 (plus finance charges from withdrawal date)
au.notes: Per-card forex is set on each card (merge reads pc.forex directly). Finance default 3.75%/mo (45% p.a.) unsecured; Zenith+ carries its own 1.99%/mo per-card. forex_exceptions/finance_exceptions intentionally EMPTY to avoid the norm() collision where 'Zenith' and 'Zenith+' both reduce to 'zenith'. Late-fee tiers not cleanly extracted -> needs_review.

yes.cash_advance: Effective 15th June 2026: 2.5% or INR 650 whichever is higher (prior to 15th June 2026: 2.5% or INR 500 whichever is higher). Waived for YES Private and AI Inside Credit Card; not applicable for any Virtual Credit Card
yes.late_fee_tiers: Up to INR 500 current outstanding (statement balance + unbilled): No late payment charges. Above INR 500: 10% of statement balance or INR 1350 whichever is lower, per statement. Waived for YES Private credit card
yes.cash_interest: Cash advances carry a finance charge equal to the charge on revolving credit (unsecured cards: 3.99% per month / 47.88% p.a.) levied from the date of withdrawal until the date of full payment; no interest-free / credit-free period applies to cash advances. For revolving credit on retail purchases, finance charges apply from the transaction date when the Total Amount Due is not paid in full by the Payment Due Date.
yes.source_section: forex flat default (3.50%) reflects the portfolio-wide modal markup (range 0%-3.50% per card, no single bank-wide markup stated) cross-checked against https://www.yes.bank.in/rates-and-charges (JS-rendered, not directly fetchable on 2026-06-26; confirmed via Section A.3.q per-card forex table); per-card forex from Section A.3.q 'Charges pertaining to Foreign Currency' p.17 (Foreign currency conversion charges Effective 15th June 2026 column); finance charges from Section A.2 'Finance Charges (Interest)' p.4 (3.99%/47.88% Other cards, 2.49%/29.88% FD-linked & NRI variants, 2.99%/35.88% YES Private/Prime/Marquee/Reserv); cash advance fee from Section A.3.a p.6; cash_interest from Section A.2 'Finance Charges (Interest)' p.4-5 (cash advances accrue finance charge from withdrawal date, no interest-free period); late fee from Section A.3.b p.6; interest free period from Section A.2 'Interest Free period' p.5

rbl.cash_advance: 2.5% of the cash amount withdrawn (Minimum INR 500)
rbl.cash_interest: All cash withdrawal transactions carry a Finance Charge (Up to 3.99% per month or 47.88% per annum) from the date of withdrawal until the date of full and final payment; no interest-free period applies on cash withdrawals from an ATM
rbl.late_fee_tiers: 12.5% of Total Outstanding Amount, Min INR 5 / Max INR 1,300
rbl.source_section: A.iii Other Fees and Charges (Foreign Currency Markup) p.13; A.iv Applicable Finance Charges table p.17; A.iii.a Cash advance fees p.15; A.iii.b/c Cash Withdrawal Charges & Interest-Free (Grace) Period p.15-16 (cash_interest); A.v Late Payment Charges p.20; KFS Interest Free (grace) Period p.1

sbm.interest_free_days: 20 to 50 days (free credit period can range up to 48 days depending on Payment Due Date, incl. 3 days grace)
sbm.source_section: All 8 cards are FD-secured. Charges are now per-card on each card object. Finance/interest rates per card p.5 ('Interest Rate for POS/ECOM after credit free period' & 'Interest Rate for ATM Withdrawal'). Forex/Surcharge table p.6-7. Cash advance fee table p.4 (Table 02). Late payment fee tables p.8-9 (Table 08). Grace period p.6 (sec. v Interest free / Grace Period). Modal secured revolver rate 3.5%pm/42%pa retained in finance_pm/pa_secured.
